title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Asiatic Society Act, 1984. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 25th June, 1984, vide notification No. G.S.R. 470(E), dated 25th June, 1984, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. (i).
